The flat topography and dense greenery are consistent with Estonian rural areas. Like its southern neighbors, the environmental markers are very similar, though the vegetation is slightly more characteristic of the Baltic region generally.
The northern plains of Poland share this temperate forest and meadow landscape. However, the specific settlement density and road edge style are slightly more characteristic of the Baltics.
